acceptance_layer: system working — matrix batch (broll + kinetic ASS + voice bank)

style_stack.visual: broll_montage PRIMARY (matrix=static plates+hard cuts; smoke keeps Ken Burns)

beats.speakable_text: If a replay loop at midnight is familiar, this overthinking pattern needs a better reset.
Trying to outrun overthinking usually makes the loop more expensive. More checking, more explaining, less actual recovery.

Overthinking often persists because your threat scanner treats uncertainty like danger and keeps proposing more scenarios. More pressure can register as more threat, even when the intention is improvement.
Try this. Write one fact, one fear. And one next action you can take in ten minutes. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.
Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. Anxious thoughts are proposals, not instructions.
